title: Watch and Pray
summary: “Nevertheless we made our prayer unto our God, and set a watch against them day and night, because of them” Neh 4:9. There is an enemy who does not want us to succeed in the work of the Lord. The Devil knew that seventy years were determined for the children of Israel to live in exile in Babylon after which the Lord would bring them back to the holy land. “In the first year of his reign I Daniel understood by books the number of the years, whereof the word of the LORD came to Jeremiah the prophet, that he would accomplish seventy years in the desolations of Jerusalem” (Daniel 9:2). We must expect the Devil to try to stir up many troubles and frustrations for the people of God when they embark on important spiritual missions. If the Temple and walls of Jerusalem would be rebuilt, people would repent, pray, and keep the commands of God. This was something the Devil was determined to stop although he knew the word of God cannot be stopped. Indeed, knowledge of the word of God and the futility of blocking its fulfillment has never deterred Satan from trying.
